rationale: The proposed change to the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount has no relation to Educ. Code §30.023, which governs appointment, qualifications, salary, and duties of the superintendent of the Texas School for the Blind and Visually Impaired.
quote: The superintendent of the Texas School for the Blind and Visually Impaired is appointed by the governing board of the school.
_note: No conflict. The rule text concerns superintendent qualifications and duties; it does not reference homestead exemptions or property tax appraisal values.
